---
title: "Join Our Team"
listing:
  - id: openings-list
    contents: 
      - "positions/*/index.qmd"
    type: default
    fields: [title, date]
    sort: "date desc"
    page-size: 10
title-block-banner: true
toc: false
---

## Learning and Research Opportunities at VinUniversity in Robotics and AI

We are currently seeking candidates for **Research Assistant (RA)**, **Master's**, **PhD**, and **Postdoctoral** positions to join our research groups in the following areas:

- Rehabilitation and assistive robotics
- Intelligent control and AI integration
- Human-robot interaction (HRI)
- Soft and compliant mechanisms
- Medical and service robotics
- Dynamics and system design

We welcome candidates with backgrounds in mechanical engineering, electrical engineering, computer science, or related fields. Successful candidates will have the opportunity to work on research projects, collaborate with leading international partners (UIUC, Cornell, UPenn, Nanyang, etc.), publish papers in prestigious journals, and access state-of-the-art facilities at VinUniversity.

### Benefits

- **Research Assistant (RA):** Up to $10,000 USD per year
- **Master's:** Tuition waiver + stipend (~$10,000 USD per year)
- **PhD:** Tuition waiver + stipend (~$15,000 USD per year)
- **Postdoctoral Researcher (Postdoc):** Up to $40,000 USD per year

### Application Details

**Location:** VinUniversity, Hanoi, Vietnam  
**Start Date:** Flexible (rolling admissions, early applications encouraged)

### How to Apply

Please send your CV and cover letter to Dr. Nguyen Vu Linh (linh.nv2@vinuni.edu.vn). Only qualified candidates will be contacted.

### Contact Person

**Dr. Nguyen Vu Linh**  
Associate Director, Mechanical Engineering Program  
VinUniversity  
Address: Vinhomes Ocean Park, Gia Lam, Hanoi, Vietnam  
Email: linh.nv2@vinuni.edu.vn

---

## Available Positions

:::{#openings-list}
:::
